specific_question: On average, how many electric vehicles did Elexion Automotives sell in Q4 2024 from leads that were obtained via word-of-mouth?
answer: An audit report from Elexion Automotive's sales department showed that the average electric vehicles sold per month from word-of-mouth leads in the last quarter of 2024 was 34 units.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
